drl:
rule "R0"
salience 10
when
    $p0_0 : T0(f1 != true, $b0_0_0 : f1, f1 == false)
then
    insert(new T1($p0_0.getF0(), false));
    modify($p0_0) { setF1(true), setF0($p0_0.getF0()) }
end
rule "R1"
when
    $a1_0 : ArrayList() from collect( T1(f1 == true, f1 != false) )
    $a1_1 : ArrayList() from collect( T2() )
then
end
rule "R2"
salience -7
when
    $p2_0 : T1(f1 == false)
then
    insertLogical(new T2($p2_0.getF0(), $p2_0.getF0(), $p2_0.isF1()));
    insertLogical(new T2($p2_0.getF0(), "alpha", false));
    $p2_0.setF1(true);
    $p2_0.setF0($p2_0.getF0());
    update($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
when
    T2(f1 matches "ab+zz", f2 == true || f0 matches "zz+abal*")
    T2(f2 == false, f2 == false, $b3_1_0 : f1, $b3_1_1 : f2)
    $a3_2 : ArrayList() from collect( T2(f0 != "", f0 in ("b")) )
then
end
rule "R4"
salience 6
no-loop
when
    T1(f0 > "", f0 contains "z", f1 == false || f1 == true || !(f1 != true), $b4_0_0 : f0)
    accumulate( T2(); $a4_1 : count() )
then
end
